# Cafehyna GitOps Infrastructure — Documentation Index

> Multi-repository GitOps infrastructure managing 34 Kubernetes services across 13 AKS clusters via 46 ArgoCD ApplicationSets.

## AI Context Quick Reference

**Repository type**: Monorepo with 2 logical parts
**Project type**: Infrastructure (infra)
**Primary technology**: ArgoCD ApplicationSets with multi-source Helm + Kustomize
**Clusters**: 13 AKS clusters across 4 business units (cafehyna, loyalty, sonora, painelclientes) in dev/hlg/prd/hub environments
**Key pattern**: Each ApplicationSet combines a public Helm chart (Source 1) with per-cluster values from `argo-cd-helm-values/` (Source 2) via the `$values` ref mechanism

### Critical Rules

- **Never** run `kubectl apply/patch/edit/delete` directly — all changes go through Git
- **Never** reference or interact with `infra-team/argocd/` (deprecated path)
- Dev clusters require **spot instance tolerations** in values files
- Run `pre-commit run --all-files` before committing

### Repository Structure at a Glance

| Path | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `infra-team/applicationset/` | 46 ApplicationSet definitions (one per service) |
| `infra-team/applicationset-templates/` | 3 reusable generator templates |
| `infra-team/argocd-repos/` | ArgoCD repository configs (Kustomize base + overlays) |
| `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/<service>/<cluster>/values.yaml` | Per-service, per-cluster Helm values |
| `scripts/` | 93 validation and automation scripts |
| `docs/` | This documentation directory |

---

## Core Documentation

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Project Overview](./project-overview.md) | Executive summary, key metrics, architecture type, recent changes |
| [Architecture](./architecture.md) | System design, multi-source pattern, sync wave ordering, security architecture |
| [Source Tree Analysis](./source-tree-analysis.md) | Annotated directory structure with file purposes |
| [Tech Stack](./tech-stack.md) | Comprehensive technology stack reference with versions |
| [Development Guide](./development-guide.md) | Setup, workflows, 22-hook validation pipeline, conventions |
| [Integration Architecture](./integration-architecture.md) | How infra-team and argo-cd-helm-values parts communicate via `$values` ref |
| [Deployment Guide](./deployment-guide.md) | Step-by-step deployment procedures per environment |
| [Project Structure](./project-structure.md) | Monorepo classification, cluster topology, key metrics |
| [Naming Conventions](./naming-conventions.md) | Naming standards across clusters, services, and files |
| [Standards](./standards.md) | Project standards and compliance requirements |

## Scan Metadata

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Project Parts Metadata](./project-parts-metadata.json) | Structured metadata for both monorepo parts (JSON) |
| [Existing Documentation Inventory](./existing-documentation-inventory.md) | Full inventory of 150+ docs across 12 categories |
| [Project Scan Report](./project-scan-report.json) | Workflow state and scan progress tracking (JSON) |

## ArgoCD Documentation

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [ApplicationSet Template Guide](./applicationset-template-guide.md) | How to use the TEMPLATE.yaml to create new services |
| [ArgoCD Add Cluster Guide](./argocd-add-cluster-guide.md) | Adding new clusters to ArgoCD management |
| [ArgoCD CLI Cluster Management](./argocd-cli-cluster-management.md) | CLI commands for cluster operations |
| [ArgoCD RBAC Guide](./argocd-rbac-guide.md) | Role-based access control configuration |
| [ArgoCD Remote Cluster Security](./argocd-remote-cluster-security.md) | Security considerations for remote clusters |
| [ArgoCD Version Configuration](./argocd-version-configuration.md) | ArgoCD version management |
| [ArgoCD Metrics Fix](./argocd-metrics-fix.md) | Metrics endpoint troubleshooting |

## Cluster Documentation

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Cluster Managed Identities](./cluster-managed-identities.md) | Azure managed identity configuration per cluster |
| [Azure Bastion AKS Private Cluster](./azure-bastion-aks-private-cluster.md) | Bastion access for private AKS clusters |
| [Azure Bastion Workflow Guide](./azure-bastion-workflow-guide.md) | Bastion connection workflows |
| [Hub Cluster Access](./hub-cluster-access.md) | ArgoCD hub cluster access procedures |
| [Hub Deployment Instructions](./hub-deployment-instructions.md) | Hub cluster deployment guide |
| [K8s Clusters](./k8s-clusters.md) | Cluster inventory and connection details |
| [K8s Cluster for ArgoCD](./k8s-cluster-for-argocd.md) | Kubernetes cluster setup for ArgoCD |
| [AKS Memory Saturation Troubleshooting](./aks-memory-saturation-troubleshooting.md) | Memory pressure diagnostics |
| [Kubernetes Resource Management](./kubernetes-resource-management.md) | Resource limits and requests patterns |
| [IP Whitelist](./ip-whitelist.md) | IP whitelisting configuration |

## Observability Documentation

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Grafana Addons Deployment](./grafana-addons-deployment.md) | Grafana plugin and dashboard deployment |
| [Grafana Azure AD SSO](./grafana-azure-ad-sso.md) | SSO integration for Grafana |
| [LGTM Distributed Reference](./lgtm-distributed-reference.md) | Loki, Grafana, Tempo, Mimir distributed setup |
| [Loki Guide](./loki-guide.md) | Log aggregation with Loki |
| [Mimir HA Deduplication](./mimir-ha-deduplication-consul.md) | Mimir high-availability with Consul |
| [Mimir Azure Identity Guide](./mimir-azure-identity-guide.md) | Mimir with Azure Workload Identity |
| [OTEL Implementation Summary](./otel-implementation-summary.md) | OpenTelemetry collector deployment |
| [Robusta Deployment Guide](./robusta-deployment-guide.md) | AI-powered K8s troubleshooting setup |
| [Robusta Dev Comprehensive Guide](./robusta-dev-comprehensive-guide.md) | Complete Robusta dev environment guide |
| [Robusta Platform Links](./robusta-platform-links.md) | Robusta platform integration links |
| [Robusta Prometheus CRD Fix](./robusta-prometheus-crd-fix.md) | CRD compatibility fix for Robusta |
| [Robusta ArgoCD Validation](./robusta_argocd_validation.md) | ArgoCD validation for Robusta |
| [Robusta OutOfSync Fix](./robusta_outofsync_fix.md) | OutOfSync resolution for Robusta |
| [Monitoring Implementation Guide](./monitoring-implementation-guide.md) | Full observability stack implementation |

## Security Documentation

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [AKV2K8S Guide](./akv2k8s-guide.md) | Azure Key Vault to Kubernetes secrets integration |
| [AKV2K8S vs ESO](./akv2k8s-vs-eso.md) | Comparison of secret management approaches |

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Cafehyna GitOps Infrastructure — Documentation Index

> Multi-repository GitOps infrastructure managing 34 Kubernetes services across 13 AKS clusters via 46 ArgoCD ApplicationSets.

## AI Context Quick Reference

**Repository type**: Monorepo with 2 logical parts
**Project type**: Infrastructure (infra)
**Primary technology**: ArgoCD ApplicationSets with multi-source Helm + Kustomize
**Clusters**: 13 AKS clusters across 4 business units (cafehyna, loyalty, sonora, painelclientes) in dev/hlg/prd/hub environments
**Key pattern**: Each ApplicationSet combines a public Helm chart (Source 1) with per-cluster values from `argo-cd-helm-values/` (Source 2) via the `$values` ref mechanism

### Critical Rules

- **Never** run `kubectl apply/patch/edit/delete` directly — all changes go through Git
- **Never** reference or interact with `infra-team/argocd/` (deprecated path)
- Dev clusters require **spot instance tolerations** in values files
- Run `pre-commit run --all-files` before committing

### Repository Structure at a Glance

| Path | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `infra-team/applicationset/` | 46 ApplicationSet definitions (one per service) |
| `infra-team/applicationset-templates/` | 3 reusable generator templates |
| `infra-team/argocd-repos/` | ArgoCD repository configs (Kustomize base + overlays) |
| `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/<service>/<cluster>/values.yaml` | Per-service, per-cluster Helm values |
| `scripts/` | 93 validation and automation scripts |
| `docs/` | This documentation directory |

---
